creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 08 May 2011 11:37:02 +0300
Andriy Gapon <avg@icyb.net.ua> wrote:

> on 07/05/2011 19:26 Juergen Lock said the following:
> > Yes currently you still need to manually merge the one-line fix
> > from r221388, and even after that's been committed to stable, people
> > on releases will still have to manually apply it and (at least)
> > rebuild and reload their sound.ko .
> 
> I have actually MFC-ed that change.
> Clutching to releases sucks :-)

I've seen that, and sound works perfectly.

I have no luck with video with my very old creative live cam and skype
(2.0.x, 2.1.x, 2.2.x):
- 2.2.x doesn't see the video device
- 2.1.x and 2.0.x see it, but the only thing shown is a green garbled
  screen

ugen0.2: <WebCam Live Creative Labs> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON

  bLength = 0x0012
  bDescriptorType = 0x0001
  bcdUSB = 0x0110
  bDeviceClass = 0x00ff
  bDeviceSubClass = 0x0000
  bDeviceProtocol = 0x0000
  bMaxPacketSize0 = 0x0008
  idVendor = 0x041e
  idProduct = 0x4036
  bcdDevice = 0x0100
  iManufacturer = 0x0001  <Creative Labs  >
  iProduct = 0x0002  <WebCam Live!   >
  iSerialNumber = 0x0000  <no string>
  bNumConfigurations = 0x0001


But anyway, we're good to go with the updates :)
